Job Location: Lagos

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Admin & HR Executive",
  "description": "Talentforge Solutions Limited (Nigeria) is an HR consulting firm in Lagos focused on recruitment, training, and outsourcing, aiming to link top talent with leading companies through integrity and innovation in HR services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Positon: Admin &amp; HR Executive
Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Administrative Support: Manage executive calendars, schedule meetings, and coordinate appointments to ensure smooth daily operations.
	Office Operations: Oversee day-to-day office functions, maintain organized physical and digital filing systems, and ensure office supplies/resources are well managed.
	Finance Support: Prepare invoices, track payments, and follow up on outstanding receivables.
	HR &amp; Recruitment: Coordinate end-to-end recruitment including job postings, shortlisting, interviews, and onboarding of new hires.
	Client &amp; Database Management: Handle client communications professionally and maintain an accurate, up-to-date client and employee database.
	Compliance: Support regulatory filings, statutory compliance, and ensure company policies are implemented and adhered to.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Human Resources, or related field.
	2&ndash;5 years of experience in Administration and HR Operations/Management. Experience in a law firm is an added advantage.
	Strong organizational, multitasking, and time-management skills with keen attention to detail.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and Google Workspace.
	High level of integrity, discretion, and ability to handle confidential information.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;resume@talentforgesolutions.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Admin & HR Executive Job at Talentforge Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Talentforge Solutions Limited (Nigeria) is an HR consulting firm in Lagos focused on recruitment, training, and outsourcing, aiming to link top talent with leading companies through integrity and innovation in HR services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Positon: Admin & HR Executive
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Administrative Support: Manage executive calendars, schedule meetings, and coordinate appointments to ensure smooth daily operations.
	Office Operations: Oversee day-to-day office functions, maintain organized physical and digital filing systems, and ensure office supplies/resources are well managed.
	Finance Support: Prepare invoices, track payments, and follow up on outstanding receivables.
	HR & Recruitment: Coordinate end-to-end recruitment including job postings, shortlisting, interviews, and onboarding of new hires.
	Client & Database Management: Handle client communications professionally and maintain an accurate, up-to-date client and employee database.
	Compliance: Support regulatory filings, statutory compliance, and ensure company policies are implemented and adhered to.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Human Resources, or related field.
	2–5 years of experience in Administration and HR Operations/Management. Experience in a law firm is an added advantage.
	Strong organizational, multitasking, and time-management skills with keen attention to detail.
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and Google Workspace.
	High level of integrity, discretion, and ability to handle confidential information.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "UI/UX Product Designer",
  "description": "Zhongxin Network Technology Company Limited is&nbsp;a fast-growing tech company dedicated to providing excellent delivery through consultative sales, timely services delivery and support to our varied clientele. We believe that great products are built at the intersection of user needs andbusiness goals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: UI/UX Product Designer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

The Role


	As our UI/UX Product Designer, you won&#39;t just be making things look &quot;pretty.&quot;
	You will own the end-to-end design process&mdash;from conducting deep user research and defining wireframes to delivering high-fidelity interactive prototypes.
	You will work closely with product managers and engineers to ensure our product is intuitive, accessible, and impactful.


Key Responsibilities


	User Research: Conduct user interviews, surveys, and usability testing to gather insights and validate design decisions.
	Experience Design: Create detailed user flows, journey maps, and wireframes that solve complex functional problems.
	Visual Design: Develop high-fidelity mockups and interactive prototypes with a keen eye for typography, color, and layout.
	Design System Management: Maintain and evolve our internal design system to ensure visual consistency across all platforms (Web, iOS, Android).
	Collaboration: Work hand-in-hand with developers to ensure designs are implemented accurately and efficiently.
	Iteration: Use data and feedback to constantly refine the product and improve the overall user experience.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree
	Experience: 3+ years of experience as a UI/UX Designer, Product Designer, or similar role (preferably in a fast-paced tech environment).
	Portfolio: A strong portfolio showcasing your design process, problem-solving skills, and finished digital products.
	Tools: Mastery of Figma (required), and familiarity with tools like Adobe Creative Suite, Framer, or Protopie.
	Mindset: A &quot;user-first&quot; mentality with a deep understanding of UX laws and accessibility standards (WCAG).
	Communication: Excellent ability to articulate your design choices to stakeholders and take constructive feedback.
	Bonus: Basic understanding of HTML/CSS/JS or experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@technocratng.com&nbsp;or&nbsp;hr@blessingcomputers.com&nbsp;using the jJob Position as the subject of the mail.",

UI/UX Product Designer Job at Zhongxin Network Technology Company Limited




        
    

        
        Zhongxin Network Technology Company Limited is a fast-growing tech company dedicated to providing excellent delivery through consultative sales, timely services delivery and support to our varied clientele. We believe that great products are built at the intersection of user needs andbusiness goals.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: UI/UX Product Designer

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

The Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	As our UI/UX Product Designer, you won't just be making things look "pretty."
	You will own the end-to-end design process—from conducting deep user research and defining wireframes to delivering high-fidelity interactive prototypes.
	You will work closely with product managers and engineers to ensure our product is intuitive, accessible, and impactful.


Key Responsibilities


	User Research: Conduct user interviews, surveys, and usability testing to gather insights and validate design decisions.
	Experience Design: Create detailed user flows, journey maps, and wireframes that solve complex functional problems.
	Visual Design: Develop high-fidelity mockups and interactive prototypes with a keen eye for typography, color, and layout.
	Design System Management: Maintain and evolve our internal design system to ensure visual consistency across all platforms (Web, iOS, Android).
	Collaboration: Work hand-in-hand with developers to ensure designs are implemented accurately and efficiently.
	Iteration: Use data and feedback to constantly refine the product and improve the overall user experience.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree
	Experience: 3+ years of experience as a UI/UX Designer, Product Designer, or similar role (preferably in a fast-paced tech environment).
	Portfolio: A strong portfolio showcasing your design process, problem-solving skills, and finished digital products.
	Tools: Mastery of Figma (required), and familiarity with tools like Adobe Creative Suite, Framer, or Protopie.
	Mindset: A "user-first" mentality with a deep understanding of UX laws and accessibility standards (WCAG).
	Communication: Excellent ability to articulate your design choices to stakeholders and take constructive feedback.
	Bonus: Basic understanding of HTML/CSS/JS or experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] or [email protected] using the jJob Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at Pharma Ethics Limited
content:
Pharma Ethics Limited is transnational pharmaceutical company based in Nigeria with its future plans to spread its activities in entire West Africa and India. We are one of the fastest growing Pharmaceutical Company focusing in the area of ethical medicines.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Medical Sales Representative

Job Location: Akure, Ondo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a dynamic and target-driven Medical Sales Representative to promote and drive the sales of our pharamceutical products in Akure and surrounding aread.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for building strong relarionships with healthcare professionals, increasing product awareness, and achieving sales targets within the assigned territory


Responsibilities


	Promote company products to doctors, pharmacists, hospitals, and other healthcare professionals
	Achieve and exceed assigned sales targets within the territory
	Conduct regular visits to healthcare facilities to build and maintain strong relationships
	Identify new business opportunities and expand the customer base
	Provide accurate product information and deliver effective sales presentations
	Monitor competitor activities and market trends within the territory
	Organize and participate in medical outreaches, campaigns, and product presentaions
	Maintain detailed records of customer interactions and sales activities
	Submit timely sales reports and market feedback


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Pharmacy, Biological Sciences, or a related field
	1 - 3 years of xperience in pharmaceutical sales or medical sales
	Good knowledge of Akure and surrounding territories
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
	Self-motivated with the ability to work independently and meet targets
	Basic understanding of medical/pharmaceutical products and terminology
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools
	Must be resident in or willing to relocate to Akure


Key Competencies:


	Sales & Negotiation Skills
	Customer Relationship Management
	Territory Management
	Communication & Presentation Skills
	Results-Oriented Mindset.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary with performance-based incentives
	Training and career development opportunites
	Supportive and performance-driven work environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using ''Application - Medical Sales Representative (Akure)'' as the subject of the mail.

 

 

2.) Area Medical Sales Manager

Job Location: Kano
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a results-driven and experienced Area Medical Sales Manager to lead our sales operations in kano and across the Northern region.
	The ideal candidate must have a strong understanding of the Northern pharmaceutical market, established relationships with key stakeholders, and a proven track record of achieving sales targets within the region.


Responsibilities


	Develop and implement strategic sales plans to acheive regional revenue targets
	Manage, coach, and supervise a team of Medical Sales Representatives across assigned territories
	Drive market penetration and business growth in Kano and surrounding Northern states.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with healthcare professionals, hospitals, pharmacies, and distributors
	Monitor competitor activities and provide market intelligence to guide business decisions
	Ensure compliance with company policies, ethical standards, and regulatory requirements.
	Prepare periodic sales reports, forecasts, and performance analysis
	Coordinate product launches, promotions, and awareness campaigns in the region


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy, Life Science, or a related field (MBA is an added advantage)
	Minimum of 5 - 7 years of experience in pharmaceutical sales, with at least 2 -3 years in a managerial role
	Strong experience working in Northern Nigeria (Kano and surrounding states is mandatory)
	Demonstrated ability to lead and motivate a high-performing sales team
	Excellent knowledge of the pharmaceutical market and distribution channels in the North
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
	Ability to analyze sales data and make informed business decisions.


Key Competencies:


	Leadership & Team Management
	Strategic Thinking & Execution
	Customer Relationship Management
	Market Intelligence & Business Insight
	Results-Oriented & Target-Driven.


What We Offer


	Competitive salary and performance-based incentives
	Career growth and development opportunites
	Supportive and performance-driven work environment
	Health benefits (HMO)


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using ''Application - Area Medical Sales Manager (Kano)'' as the subject of the mail.

 

3.) Office Personnel

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Provide general administrative and clerical support to the office
	Manage correspondence, emails and phone calls professionally
	Maintain proper filing systems (physical and electronic records)
	Coordinate meetings, schedules and office logistics
	Handle documentation, data entry and report preparation
	Support HR and finance teams with basic administrative tasks
	Ensure office supplies are adequately stocked and managed
	Assist with onboarding logistics for new employees


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree or HND in Business Administrative, Office Management, or related field
	1 - 3 years of experience in an administrative or office support role
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	High level of professionalism, integrity, and attention to detail
	Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using ''Office Personnel'' as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
